description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The structure features a combination of white and gray exterior walls, large glass doors, and multiple windows that allow ample natural light. The front area includes a small garden with stepping stones, potted plants, and a wooden entrance door. On one side, there is a covered patio or veranda with a transparent roof, outdoor seating, and a dining area. The rear and side yards are landscaped with grass, planters, and decorative elements, creating a private outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor areas, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped outdoor spaces including a covered patio and garden. The design features clean lines and a mix of white and gray surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, and a landscaped garden with planters and grass.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the covered patio/veranda with transparent roofing and outdoor seating, as well as the side garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with stepping stones, planters, and the back entrance door.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the open lawn, pathway, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
